data.title: RED: Write structural boundary test for brainstorm SKILL.md two-call no-arg block
data.description: Write structural test asserting brainstorm SKILL.md no-arg block contains: (1) a call with --max-children=0 (zero-child category), (2) a call with --min-children=1 --without-tag=brainstorm:complete (scrutiny-gap category), (3) two labeled presentation headings distinguishing the categories. Test FAILS before SKILL.md is updated. testing_mode: RED. Rule 5 compliant — tests structural boundary (section markers, flags), not SKILL.md prose content.
